code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> PENDING: Invoice Created

    PENDING --> PROCESSING: Payment Initiated
    PENDING --> CANCELLED: User Cancelled
    PENDING --> EXPIRED: Timeout Reached

    PROCESSING --> COMPLETED: Payment Verified
    PROCESSING --> FAILED: Payment Error

    FAILED --> PENDING: Retry Payment

    COMPLETED --> PARTIALLY_REFUNDED: Partial Refund
    COMPLETED --> REFUNDED: Full Refund

    PARTIALLY_REFUNDED --> REFUNDED: Remaining Refund

    CANCELLED --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]
    EXPIRED --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]
    REFUNDED --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]

    note right of PENDING
        Invoice awaiting payment
        Valid for 1 hour (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
    end note

    note right of PROCESSING
        Payment being verified
        Transaction in progress
    end note

    note right of COMPLETED
        Payment successful
        Preimage verified
    end note

    note right of FAILED
        Payment failed
        Retryable errors can
        transition back to PENDING
    end note

    note right of REFUNDED
        Full or partial refund
        completed
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网边缘节点设计一个支付状态机。起点是IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode，当发票创建后进入PENDING状态。这个状态有个关键约束——基于IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic，必须在1小时内完成支付，否则超时。
明白了。所以PENDING有三个出口：用户主动支付进入PROCESSING，用户取消到CANCELLED，超时到EXPIRED。我注意到CANCELLED应该能回到边缘节点本身，而EXPIRED要流向遥测流做日志记录？
对，CANCELLED闭环回边缘节点，EXPIRED则触发遥测上报。PROCESSING阶段需要标注"Payment being verified"和"Transaction in progress"，完成后到COMPLETED。
已添加PROCESSING到COMPLETED的转移。现在处理异常分支：PROCESSING遇到支付错误时进入FAILED状态，这个状态需要支持重试——FAILED可以回到PENDING重新发起。
COMPLETED之后要有退款能力。设计两个状态：PARTIALLY_REFUNDED部分退款，和REFUNDED全额退款。部分退款后如果继续退剩余金额，可以流转到全额退款状态。
全额退款完成后，按照工业控制逻辑，应该由执行器控制器来执行物理退款动作？所以REFUNDED的终点是IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController？
正确。现在补充各状态的注释：PENDING注明"Invoice awaiting payment"和1小时有效期；FAILED要说明"Retryable errors can transition back to PENDING"；COMPLETED需要"Preimage verified"；REFUNDED统一标注"Full or partial refund completed"。
所有注释已添加，状态流转完整。从边缘节点发票创建开始，经过支付、验证、完成或退款的完整生命周期，异常和超时都有妥善处理，最终与执行器控制器联动。
